title: VeloraOS 1.10.12 - Model Intelligence
releaseNotes: Adds VeloraOS Automatic, Tiny, Quick and Deep Thoughts choices to Chat.
VeloraOS Tiny uses tinyllama:1.1b for basic operations; Quick and Deep Thoughts use qwen3:4b with different reasoning profiles.
Automatic mode intelligently routes each prompt to an installed VeloraOS profile and shows which one it selected.
Manual model selection always overrides Automatic routing.
Preserves background jobs, HTTPS, PWA support, accounts, chats, licensing and secure rollback updates.
